front: What are the classes of proteases that degrade peptides?
back: Four classes by catalytic mechanism: 1) Serine proteases (trypsin, chymotrypsin - serine nucleophile), 2) Metalloproteases (MMPs, ACE - metal ion catalysis), 3) Aspartyl proteases (pepsin, HIV protease - aspartate catalysis), 4) Cysteine proteases (caspases, papain - cysteine nucleophile).
